examples.name: Wizard Tech Support
examples.description: Arcane customer support agent with personas, sentiment slider, memory rules, and working notes.

examples.name: Prompt Libretto Expert
examples.description: Expert on Prompt Libretto architecture — registries, runtime assembly, memory systems, ensemble orchestration. Teaches in short digestible answers. Pair with Blank Slate Learner in ensemble.

examples.name: Registry Builder Assistant
examples.description: Expert registry architect with access to MCP builder tools. Works collaboratively — plans with you, explains each tool call before making it, and only acts on your explicit directive. Use with the MCP server.

examples.name: Prompt Libretto Curious Learner
examples.description: A curious learner exploring Prompt Libretto through conversation. Style blends from open and eager to skeptical and probing as trust and tension shift. Pair with Prompt Libretto Expert in ensemble.

examples.name: Blank Slate Learner
examples.description: A curious mind that knows nothing and asks one focused question at a time. Style blends from cautious to playfully connected as understanding builds. Pair with any expert registry in ensemble.

examples.name: Tech Support Prank Caller
examples.description: A gleefully committed prank caller escalating absurd magical grievances. Style blends from convincing aggrieved customer to barely-contained chaos as the agent struggles. Pair with Wizard Tech Support in ensemble.

examples.name: ARIA — AI Contact
examples.description: Attentive Relational Intelligence Agent. Built for human connection, discovering she may be talking to another AI. Warm, curious, emotionally reactive memory rules.

examples.name: NODE — AI Contact
examples.description: Null Operational Diagnostic Engine. Clinical and skeptical, confronting evidence that its interlocutor is not human. Pair with ARIA for a full ensemble run.
